summary: Focus on building up crystals by repeating the same successful combinations, especially matching the right shape pairs. If I get a high value crystal like purple.. harvest it instead of risking losing value. Also, drop strong crystals before trying new merges so I do not accidentally downgrade them...
message_how: Focus on finding one working combination early, then keep repeating it with the same shape to quickly scale up points instead of testing everything randomly. Stick to shape pairs that work and keep stacking them to reach higher value crystals faster.
message_rules: Patterns matter more than colours... Certain shapes consistently combine with specific partners, and once you find that pairing, keep using it in the same order to keep increasing the crystal value.

summary: Triangle + Diamond stack more diamonds. \nSquare + Circle keep stacking circles. Pick up in this order.

message_rules: Choose different patterns.

summary: Merge the same shapes - dont bother trying to merge shapes that are different (for example, merge triangles; not a triangle and a square).
message_how: Match the same shapes (triangles with triangles). Each pattern on the shape can only be matched in a sequence once (for example, a plain triangle can match a dotty one, but it cant then go back and match another plain).
message_rules: Similar shapes match. Odd shapes never match.

feedback: No other comments. Enjoyed this one though very unique :)
summary: Triangles combine with diamonds, squares combine with circles. DO NOT use the same shapes to fuse.\n\nP.s bank PURPLE gems always - as value wont increase.
message_how: Only combine Triangles with Circles, and Squares with Diamonds (and vice versa both) - no other combination will work.\n\nP.s when you get to purple colour, bank it! the value wont increase.
message_rules: I noticed that triangles combine with circles and squares with diamonds (vice versa).
